description:
Returns whether or not user input is disabled.
{{Feature|important|The disabled input system internally ''counts'' how many times <sqf inline>disableUserInput true</sqf> has been called - see {{Link|#Example 2}}.}}
examples:
<sqf>
disableUserInput true;
disableUserInput true;
disableUserInput true;

diag_log str userInputDisabled; // true

disableUserInput false;
diag_log str userInputDisabled; // true

disableUserInput false;
diag_log str userInputDisabled; // true

disableUserInput false;
diag_log str userInputDisabled; // false - control is regained only here
</sqf>
name: userInputDisabled
